title: polygala rupestris
intro: Polygala rupestris, also known as Mountain joepyegrass or Yellow False Indigo, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Polygala rupestris include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating gastrointestinal problems like diarrhea and constipation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions and infusions, and it can also be dried and made into teas or capsules for its medicinal benefits.
